# Docs Pages Guidance

Use this reference for **D2 — Docs Pages**.

## Purpose

Guide the creation or update of Markdown files under `docs/`.

## Good docs page candidates

- architecture overview
- client hierarchy explanation
- contributor onboarding
- endpoint-family walkthroughs
- release process overview

## Rules

- Prefer one clear subject per page.
- Write for a defined audience: user, contributor, or maintainer.
- Link back to README instead of duplicating onboarding content.
- Use terminology consistent with the SDK: `TorBoxClient`, `Main`, `Search`, `Relay`, resource clients.
- If the page describes planned work, state clearly that it is roadmap-based.
